questions.question: Describe the key drivers behind the shift towards Green IT and Sustainability in recent years. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider environmental, economic and social factors

questions.question: What are some of the major challenges that organizations face when implementing Green IT initiatives? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider budget constraints, infrastructure limitations and employee engagement

questions.question: How do you think the increasing focus on sustainability and climate change will impact the Green IT agenda in the next 5 years? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Consider regulatory requirements, technological advancements and changing consumer behavior
